content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "點餐猶豫",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要點什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào diǎn shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 dian3 shen2 me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to order?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 주문하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "嗯，我想一下喔……那個，我要一杯珍珠奶茶，半糖少冰。",
          "pinyin": "Ēn, wǒ xiǎng yīxià ō…… nàge, wǒ yào yī bēi zhēnzhū nǎichá, bàn táng shǎo bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "En1, wo3 xiang3 yi1 xia4 o1…… na4 ge5, wo3 yao4 yi1 bei1 zhen1 zhu1 nai3 cha2, ban4 tang2 shao3 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "Um, let me think... well, I'd like a bubble milk tea, half sugar and less ice.",
          "translation_ko": "음, 잠깐 생각해볼게요... 저, 버블 밀크티 한 잔, 당 반, 얼음 적게 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，半糖少冰。還要別的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, bàn táng shǎo bīng. Hái yào bié de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, ban4 tang2 shao3 bing1. Hai2 yao4 bie2 de5 ma3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, half sugar and less ice. Anything else?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 당 반, 얼음 적게요. 다른 것도 필요하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zài kàn yīxià càidān…… nàge, wǒ hái xiǎng yào yī ge sānmíngzhì, é méi yǒu, jiùshì shuō, huǒ tuǐ de.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zai4 kan4 yi1 xia4 cai4 dan1…… na4 ge5, wo3 hai2 xiang3 yao4 yi1 ge5 san1 ming2 zhi4, e4 mei2 you3, jiu4 shi4 shuo1, huo3 tui3 de5.",
          "text": "我再看一下菜單……那個，我還想要一個三明治，呃沒有，就是說，火腿的。",
          "translation_en": "Let me look at the menu again... um, I also want a sandwich, uh no, I mean, ham.",
          "translation_ko": "메뉴를 좀 더 볼게요... 저, 샌드위치도 하나 더, 어 아니, 그러니까, 햄으로요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, yī ge huǒ tuǐ sānmíngzhì. Zhèyàng jiù zhèxiē ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, yi1 ge5 huo3 tui3 san1 ming2 zhi4. Zhe4 yang4 jiu4 zhe4 xie1 ma3?",
          "text": "好，一個火腿三明治。這樣就這些嗎？",
          "translation_en": "Okay, one ham sandwich. Is that all?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 햄 샌드위치 하나요. 이걸로 다인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, jiù zhèyàng. Xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a5, jiu4 zhe4 yang4. Xie4 xie5.",
          "text": "對啊，就這樣。謝謝。",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, that's it. Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 그게 다예요. 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Bubble milk tea and ham sandwich", "Coffee and sandwich", "Tea and cake"],
          "options_ko": ["버블 밀크티와 햄 샌드위치", "커피와 샌드위치", "차와 케이크"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat after the customer, using natural pauses and fillers like '嗯', '那個', '就是說'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Order a drink and a snack at a bubble tea shop, hesitating naturally like the customer."
    },
    {
      "title": "自我修正",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ zhīdào ma, wǒ zuótiān qù le yī jiā xīn de cāntīng, jiùshì shuō, zài gōngsī fùjìn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 zhi1 dao4 ma5, wo3 zuo2 tian1 qu4 le5 yi1 jia1 xin1 de5 can1 ting1, jiu4 shi4 shuo1, zai4 gong1 si1 fu4 jin4.",
          "text": "你知道嗎，我昨天去了一家新的餐廳，就是說，在公司附近。",
          "translation_en": "You know, I went to a new restaurant yesterday, I mean, near the company.",
          "translation_ko": "있잖아, 나 어제 새 식당에 갔어, 그러니까, 회사 근처에."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "pinyin": "Ō, shì ma? Nà jiā diàn zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "O1, shi4 ma5? Na4 jia1 dian4 zen3 me5 yang4?",
          "text": "哦，是嗎？那家店怎麼樣？",
          "translation_en": "Oh, really? How was that place?",
          "translation_ko": "아, 그래? 그 가게 어땠어?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ juéde hái bùcuò, dànshì——āi, bùshì, wǒ de yìsi shì, tā de zhāopái cài hěn hǎo chī, kěshì fúwù yǒu diǎn màn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 jue2 de5 hai2 bu4 cuo4, dan4 shi4——ai1, bu2 shi4, wo3 de5 yi4 si1 shi4, ta1 de5 zhao1 pai2 cai4 hen3 hao3 chi1, ke3 shi4 fu2 wu4 you3 dian3 man4.",
          "text": "我覺得還不錯，但是——哎，不是，我的意思是，它的招牌菜很好吃，可是服務有點慢。",
          "translation_en": "I thought it was okay, but—ah, no, I mean, its signature dish was delicious, but the service was a bit slow.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮다고 생각했는데, 아, 아니, 내 말은, 그 가게 대표 메뉴는 맛있었는데 서비스가 좀 느렸어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "pinyin": "Zhèyàng a. Nà nǐ huì zài qù ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 yang4 a5. Na4 ni3 hui4 zai4 qu4 ma5?",
          "text": "這樣啊。那你會再去嗎？",
          "translation_en": "I see. Would you go again?",
          "translation_ko": "그렇구나. 그럼 다시 갈 거야?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "pinyin": "Ēn…… yīnggāi huì ba, dànshì wǒ xiǎng huàn yīxià shuō, xià cì qù de shíhou yào zǎo yīdiǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "En1…… ying1 gai1 hui4 ba5, dan4 shi4 wo3 xiang3 huan4 yi1 xia4 shuo1, xia4 ci4 qu4 de5 shi2 hou5 yao4 zao3 yi1 dian3.",
          "text": "嗯……應該會吧，但是我想換一下說，下次去的時候要早一點。",
          "translation_en": "Hmm... probably, but let me rephrase, next time I'll go earlier.",
          "translation_ko": "음... 아마 갈 거야, 그런데 말을 바꾸자면, 다음에 갈 때는 좀 일찍 가려고."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did A correct about the restaurant?",
          "question_ko": "A가 식당에 대해 무엇을 수정했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The food was bad", "The service was slow, not the food", "The location was wrong"],
          "options_ko": ["음식이 나빴다", "서비스가 느렸지 음식이 나쁜 게 아니다", "위치가 틀렸다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Practice self-correction phrases like '不是', '我的意思是', '換一下說' with natural intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell a friend about a restaurant you visited, then correct yourself on one detail."
    },
    {
      "title": "確認理解",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen xià ge xīngqī liù qù jiǔfèn, hǎo ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 men5 xia4 ge5 xing1 qi1 liu4 qu4 jiu3 fen4, hao3 ma5?",
          "text": "我們下個星期六去九份，好嗎？",
          "translation_en": "Let's go to Jiufen next Saturday, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "우리 다음 주 토요일에 지우펀에 가는 게 어때?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "pinyin": "Jiǔfèn? Nàge, wǒ zhīdào nà ge dìfang, jiùshì shuō, hěn duō xiǎochī de dìfang, duì bù duì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jiu3 fen4? Na4 ge5, wo3 zhi1 dao4 na4 ge5 di4 fang5, jiu4 shi4 shuo1, hen3 duo1 xiao3 chi1 de5 di4 fang5, dui4 bu4 dui4?",
          "text": "九份？那個，我知道那個地方，就是說，很多小吃的地方，對不對？",
          "translation_en": "Jiufen? Um, I know that place, I mean, a place with lots of snacks, right?",
          "translation_ko": "지우펀? 저, 그 장소 알아, 그러니까, 간식이 많은 곳, 맞지?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, nà lǐ yǒu hěn duō tèchǎn, hái yǒu hǎo kàn de fēngjǐng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a5, na4 li3 you3 hen3 duo1 te4 chan3, hai2 you3 hao3 kan4 de5 feng1 jing3.",
          "text": "對啊，那裡有很多特產，還有好看的風景。",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, there are lots of local specialties and beautiful scenery.",
          "translation_ko": "맞아, 거기 특산물도 많고 경치도 예뻐."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "pinyin": "Nà wǒmen zěnme qù? Zuò huǒchē háishì kāichē?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wo3 men5 zen3 me5 qu4? Zuo4 huo3 che1 hai2 shi4 kai1 che1?",
          "text": "那我們怎麼去？坐火車還是開車？",
          "translation_en": "Then how do we get there? By train or by car?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 우리 어떻게 가? 기차 타고 갈까, 운전해서 갈까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ juéde zuò huǒchē bǐjiào hǎo, yīnwèi bùyòng dānxīn sāichē. Nǐ juéde ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 jue2 de5 zuo4 huo3 che1 bi3 jiao4 hao3, yin1 wei4 bu4 yong4 dan1 xin1 sai1 che1. Ni3 jue2 de5 ne5?",
          "text": "我覺得坐火車比較好，因為不用擔心塞車。你覺得呢？",
          "translation_en": "I think taking the train is better because we don't have to worry about traffic. What do you think?",
          "translation_ko": "나는 기차 타는 게 더 나은 것 같아, 차 막힐 걱정이 없으니까. 너는 어떻게 생각해?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "pinyin": "Yě duì, nà wǒmen jiù zuò huǒchē. Wǒ zài quèrèn yīxià, shì xià ge xīngqī liù shàngwǔ chūfā, duì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ye3 dui4, na4 wo3 men5 jiu4 zuo4 huo3 che1. Wo3 zai4 que4 ren4 yi1 xia4, shi4 xia4 ge5 xing1 qi1 liu4 shang4 wu3 chu1 fa1, dui4 ma5?",
          "text": "也對，那我們就坐火車。我再確認一下，是下個星期六上午出發，對嗎？",
          "translation_en": "That's right, so let's take the train. Let me confirm, we're leaving next Saturday morning, right?",
          "translation_ko": "그래, 그럼 기차 타자. 내가 다시 확인할게, 다음 주 토요일 오전에 출발하는 거 맞지?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "pinyin": "Duì, méi wèntí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, mei2 wen4 ti2.",
          "text": "對，沒問題。",
          "translation_en": "Yes, no problem.",
          "translation_ko": "응, 문제없어."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How will they go to Jiufen?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 지우펀에 어떻게 갑니까?",
          "options_en": ["By car", "By train", "By bus"],
          "options_ko": ["자동차로", "기차로", "버스로"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Practice confirmation phrases like '對不對', '確認一下', '對嗎' with rising intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Plan a trip with a friend, confirming each detail using natural fillers and questions."
    }
  ]
}
